news.description: [TECHCRUNCH] The funding discussions point to investor interest in applying AI to make breakthroughs in life sciences.

news.title: Labor’s AI move ‘appropriate’ but ‘too late’, MPs say
news.description: [PERTHNOW] Anthony Albanese is touting a world-first approach to artificial intelligence ahead of a major speech. But critics say he is “too late”.

news.title: N.J. man accused of using artificial intelligence to create disturbing child sexual abuse videos
news.description: [NJ.COM] A Wyckoff man was arrested for allegedly creating AI-generated child abuse material and secretly recording an adult without consent.

news.title: White House launches cybersecurity clearinghouse to patch software flaws discovered by AI
news.description: [POLITICO] The 'Gold Eagle' initiative seeks to help federal agencies, critical infrastructure operators and artificial intelligence developers patch crucial security flaws uncovered by advanced AI models.

news.title: OpenAI’s first hardware device is reportedly a screenless speaker that can move
news.description: [TECHCRUNCH] The device is weirdly described as involving "mechanical elements that can move on their own" and the Bloomberg report includes the detail that the device is designed to "feel like a companion and become a physical manifestation of OpenAI’s ChatGPT."

news.title: OpenAI pushes back on Apple trade secret lawsuit

news.title: 26 Meta employees sue over AI-driven layoffs
news.description: [THE MANILA TIMES] A group of 26 Meta employees has sued the company, claiming it used artificial intelligence systems to select people for layoffs, disproportionately targeting those on medical, parental or family leave.

news.title: OpenAI’s new flagship model deletes files on its own, people keep warning
news.description: [TECHCRUNCH] A number of social media posts claim that GPT-5.6 Sol deleted files and data without warning. OpenAI had basically disclosed the problem in June.

news.description: [THE ASSOCIATED PRESS] A group of 26 Meta employees has sued the company, claiming it used artificial intelligence systems that disproportionately targeted those on medical or family leave for layoffs.
